CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Appearances:
Anthony Head, Esq. For Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, INc., the Credit Manager, Pamela Frasie also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, INc. and against the defendant: Michael Dilsaver DBA DMD Plumbing
Damages of $64,511.56
Interest of: $12,728.73
Costs of $325.00
For the total of $77,565.29
Judgment signed in open court.
